name: side-link-preview
description: Chrome extension that opens target="_blank" links in Chrome's Side Panel for split-view side-by-side reading.

scripts.validate:locales: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const dir='locales';const files=fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.json'));const en=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(dir+'/en.json','utf8'));const ek=Object.keys(en).sort();let ok=true;for(const f of files){const k=Object.keys(JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(dir+'/'+f,'utf8'))).sort();const m=ek.filter(x=>!k.includes(x));const e=k.filter(x=>!ek.includes(x));if(m.length||e.length){ok=false;console.log('FAIL',f,'missing:',m,'extra:',e);}else{console.log('ok  ',f,'('+k.length+' keys)');}}process.exit(ok?0:1);"
